introduction: Billy grew up in the Wild West, captivated by the stories of his father, a former adventurer.He already has his cowboy outfit and, above all, he has a desire, as big as he is, to live the great adventure in this fabulous playground that beckons to him every morning: the Wild West! So he takes with him his inseparable friend Jean-Claude, the earthworm, and his accomplice Suzie, the little weasel, and off they go!But in the Wild West, as in life, nothing is predetermined, and they quickly find themselves facing unforeseen situations, sometimes as prickly as cacti. By overcoming them side by side, by finding solutions together, Billy, Jean-Claude, and Suzie transform every situation into unforgettable slices of life.
